description.content: Retrieves estimated shipping rates for the current cart based on the provided shipping address. May be throttled for repeated requests.
Search suggestions for products, collections, pages, and articles
Retrieves predictive search results for a query string. Returns matching products, collections, pages, articles, and query suggestions. Used for search-as-you-type experiences.

query.description: Comma-separated resource types to search (product, page, article, collection, query)
Number of results per type (1-10, default 10)
How the limit is distributed: all (shared across types) or each (per type)
Comma-separated fields to search within (title, product_type, vendor, tag, variants.title, variants.sku, body)

response.name: Predictive search results
response.body:
{

description.content: Retrieves product recommendations for a given product. Returns related or complementary products based on purchase history, product descriptions, and related collections.

query.description: (Required) The product ID to get recommendations for

response.name: Product recommendations

item.name: Shopify Retrieve a product by its handle

request.name: Shopify Retrieve a product by its handle

description.content: Retrieves product information in JSON format using the product handle. Returns product metadata, pricing, variants (up to 250), images, options, and availability. Monetary values reflect the customer presentment currency.

response.name: The product data

description.content:
The Shopify Ajax API provides lightweight REST endpoints for Shopify theme development. It is an unauthenticated API used to manage the shopping cart, retrieve product data, get product recommendations, and provide predictive search within Shopify-hosted storefronts. All responses return JSON.

Contact Support:
 Name: Shopify
 Email: api@shopify.com
